name: OpenCode | The open source AI coding agent
snippet:
OpenCode is an open source agent that helps you write code in your terminal , IDE, or desktop. [*]. LSP enabled Automatically loads the right LSPs for the LLM.
The open source AI coding agent. Free models included or connect any model from any provider, including Claude, GPT, Gemini and more.
What is OpenCode? OpenCode is an open source agent that helps you write code in your terminal, IDE, or desktop.

Although we recommend the models we provide through OpenCode Zen, OpenCode can be used with Claude, OpenAI, Google, or even local models. As models evolve, the gaps between them will close and pricing will drop, so being provider-agnostic is important.

snippet: Welcome to OpenCode documentation! OpenCode is an open-source AI coding assistant that provides intelligent code completion, code generation, and conversational programming experience.
